    Argument of type '(r: {    status: string;}) => boolean' is not assignable to parameter of type '(value: Row, index: number, array: Row[]) => value is Row'.
      Types of parameters 'r' and 'value' are incompatible.
        Property 'status' is missing in type 'Row' but required in type '{ status: string; }'.

      Types of parameters 'r' and 'value' are incompatible.
        Type 'Row' is not assignable to type '{ status: string; }'.
